  Thanks for the PR! Keep it focused on one logical change.
  See CONTRIBUTORS.md for branch naming and Conventional Commits.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — no behavior change
- [ ] `perf` — performance
- [ ] `docs` — documentation
- [ ] `build` / `ci` / `chore` — tooling or maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name and commits follow [CONTRIBUTORS.md](../CONTRIBUTORS.md) (Conventional Commits)
- [ ] `bun run lint` passes
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `bun run format:check` passes (the pre-commit hook covers staged files)
- [ ] Verified on **mobile Safari (WebKit)** and **Chrome** (for UI changes)
- [ ] Updated docs (`README.md` / `CLAUDE.md`) if behavior or architecture changed

<!-- For UI changes, include both mobile and desktop. -->
